test_cases.title: Analyzer CLI produces valid JSON report with expected keys
test_cases.description: Run pi-session-analyzer with --since 7d --format json, verify output contains tool_stats, token_stats, skill_stats, error_stats top-level keys
steps: Parse output JSON, assert top-level keys include tool_stats, token_stats, skill_stats
Assert tool_stats.total_calls is a non-negative number

test_cases.title: buildJudgeInput creates valid input files for each target
test_cases.description: Call buildJudgeInput with each target type, verify temp files created and non-empty
steps: Call buildJudgeInput(report, 'all', tmpDir), verify reportPath exists and file size > 0
Call buildJudgeInput(report, 'claude-md', tmpDir), verify promptFilePath exists
Call buildJudgeInput(report, 'skill', tmpDir), verify reportPath exists

test_cases.title: handleEvolve returns error when analyzer script missing
test_cases.description: Set ANALYZER_SCRIPT to nonexistent path, verify clear error message
steps: Call handleEvolve with no recent reports
Assert error message contains 'not found' or 'install'

test_cases.title: merge-reviewer target maps to correct template
buildJudgeInput accepts merge-reviewer target without error
test_cases.description: Call buildJudgeInput with target='merge-reviewer', verify no throw

test_cases.title: handleEvolveApply list shows diff preview
test_cases.description: Create pending suggestions with diff content, verify list output includes diff preview
steps: Save pending file with suggestions containing non-empty diff
Assert content text includes diff-related content or 'Diff target'

test_cases.title: applySuggestion rejects path outside whitelist
test_cases.description: Attempt to apply suggestion targeting /etc/passwd, verify rejection

test_cases.title: apply + rollback roundtrip preserves original content
test_cases.description: Apply a suggestion to a temp file, then rollback, verify content restored
steps: Create temp .md file under ~/.pi/agent/ with known content
Create suggestion with valid diff modifying one line
Call rollbackSuggestion with history entry, assert success

test_cases.title: rollbackSuggestion fails gracefully when backup missing
test_cases.description: Attempt rollback with nonexistent backup file, verify error message

test_cases.title: Auto-trigger token-decline rule fires for elevated token usage
test_cases.description: Create daily files with 3 consecutive high-token days, verify flag created
steps: Create 14 daily JSON files: first 7 normal, last 3 with 3x token/session
Assert flags include one with rule='token-decline'

test_cases.title: Auto-trigger skill-dormant rule fires for inactive skills
test_cases.description: Create skill-triggers.json with skill last triggered > 30 days ago
steps: Write skill-triggers.json with 'old-skill' lastTriggered 45 days ago
Assert flags include one with rule='skill-dormant' mentioning 'old-skill'

test_cases.title: Auto-trigger returns empty for healthy data
test_cases.description: Create 14 days of uniform data, verify no flags
steps: Create 14 daily JSON files with uniform token/session ~300
Write skill-triggers.json with recently triggered skill

test_cases.title: parseJudgeOutput handles markdown-wrapped JSON
test_cases.description: Pass ```json [...] ``` wrapped output, verify parsing succeeds
steps: Call parseJudgeOutput with markdown-fence wrapped JSON array
Assert result is array with correct length

test_cases.title: parseJudgeOutput skips entries with invalid confidence
test_cases.description: Pass array with one valid and one confidence=1.5 entry, verify only valid kept
steps: Call parseJudgeOutput with mixed array (confidence 0.85 and 1.5)

test_cases.title: D3.3: session-quality template produces actionable suggestions
test_cases.description: Run Judge with session-quality template on real data, score output quality
steps: Run pi subprocess with session-quality.txt system prompt
Score output on 5 dimensions (format, fields, confidence, actionability, relevance)

test_cases.title: D3.3: prompt-optimize template produces actionable suggestions
test_cases.description: Run Judge with prompt-optimize template on real data, score output quality
steps: Run pi subprocess with prompt-optimize.txt system prompt

test_cases.title: D3.3: skill-health template produces actionable suggestions
test_cases.description: Run Judge with skill-health template on real data, score output quality
steps: Run pi subprocess with skill-health.txt system prompt
